full_text:
Wei Huang (Dewei) 韋晃
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Huang (韋晃), styledDewei. Han loyalist. Participated in a coup with Geng Ji and Jin Yi. Captured by Xiahou Dun. Wei Huang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Han Dynasty. Wei Huang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
